title: How Relaible Is Monday
excerpt: Hey guys, I had a question. How reliable is Monday.com? I’ve been considering shifting more of my workflow process into Monday, but my worry comes in what if Monday.com goes down for a few days or a week. What that would…

posts.author: epjustin (Extus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys, I had a question. How reliable is Monday.com? I’ve been considering shifting more of my workflow process into Monday, but my worry comes in what if Monday.com goes down for a few days or a week. What that would mean is that I’d not be able to access my workfiles.

What does Monday have in place to address this issue?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Although there are some glitches, their uptime is amazing. See https://status.monday.com/

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @epjustin

As @basdebruin mentioned, you can view our uptime statistics via our Status page - https://status.monday.com/

Additionally, you can read more about how we ensure our platform availability here: FAQs - Security and Privacy

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @epjustin

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as solved.
This means that the thread will close in 7 days time

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
